(209) 944-4700
Est. 1968

Caring for our community for over 55 years

Community Medical Centers is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) committed to providing quality healthcare regardless of ability to pay.

Our Mission

To provide comprehensive, high quality, culturally sensitive health care to the medically underserved populations of the Central Valley through a network of community health centers.

Our History

A Legacy of Community Care
